# yba_azure_storage_config (Resource)

Azure Blob Storage Configuration for YugabyteDB Anywhere backups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_location` (String) Azure Blob Storage container URI (e.g., https://<account>.blob.core.windows.net/<container>).
- `name` (String) Name of the Azure storage configuration.

### Optional

- `region_locations` (Block List) Region-specific backup locations for multi-region backups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--region_locations))
- `sas_token` (String, Sensitive) Azure SAS (Shared Access Signature) token. Required if use_azure_iam is false.
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))
- `use_azure_iam` (Boolean) Use Azure managed identities for authentication. If true, sas_token is not required. Default: false.

### Read-Only

- `config_uuid` (String) UUID of the storage configuration.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--region_locations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region_locations`

Required:

- `location` (String) Azure Blob Storage URI for this region.
- `region` (String) Azure region name (e.g., eastus).

Optional:

- `sas_token` (String, Sensitive) Azure SAS token for this region (if different from main).


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
